title: Code-to-Figma component mapping registry
description: Live Figma binding registry: a mapping from each React chrome component to its live Figma node, enforced by scripts/figma-registry-check.ts. Authored by the generator (--write); bindings point at SlhonORmySdoSMTQgDWw3w, with explicit aliases when the Figma node name intentionally differs from the local component identity.

name.description: The exported React component name; this remains the local code identity even when the Figma node uses a canonical primitive name.

source.description: POSIX-relative path from frontend/ to the component's source file.

designSurface.description: Whether this export is a visual design surface expected to bind to a Figma node. False for non-visual exports (scene-layer wrappers, behaviour handlers, the AppShell composition) that have no standalone Figma design.

figmaNodeId.description: The Figma node id of the bound main component, or null until seeded.

figmaUrl.description: The Figma URL of the bound node, or null until seeded.

figmaNodeName.description: The live Figma node name when it intentionally differs from the local component name. Null means the bound node is expected to match `name`.

bindingKind.description: Classifies the binding so primitive aliases and suspect live-node matches are explicit and reviewable.
